summary: Completed comprehensive responsive and security testing for Özpınarlar İnşaat Grubu website. All 24 security tests passed. All responsive tests passed for mobile (375px) and tablet (768px) viewports.

issues: Route is /hakkimda not /hakkimizda - navigation link in Navbar shows 'Hakkımda' which is correct

passed_tests: Responsive - Homepage mobile (375px) - No horizontal scroll, hamburger menu visible
Responsive - Homepage tablet (768px) - Full navigation visible, layout adapts
Responsive - Projects page mobile (375px) - Filter buttons wrap correctly
Responsive - Project detail page mobile (375px) - Content stacks vertically
Responsive - About page mobile (375px) - Content readable, no overflow
Responsive - Contact page mobile (375px) - Form usable, cards stack
Responsive - Admin login page mobile (375px) - Form centered, usable
Responsive - Admin dashboard mobile (375px) - Stats cards stack, no overflow
Security - SQL injection in contact form name field - Handled safely
Security - SQL injection in contact form email field - Rejected by validation
Security - SQL injection in contact form message field - Handled safely
Security - XSS in contact form name field - Stored safely (escaped on display)
Security - XSS in contact form subject field - Handled safely
Security - XSS in contact form message field - Handled safely
Security - Admin messages endpoint requires auth (401)
Security - Admin users endpoint requires auth (401)
Security - Project creation requires auth (401)
Security - Project deletion requires auth (401)
Security - Blog creation requires auth (401)
Security - Invalid token rejected (401)
Security - Malformed token rejected (401)
Security - Missing Bearer prefix rejected
Security - Valid login works (admin/admin123)
Security - Invalid password rejected (401)
Security - Invalid username rejected (401)
Security - SQL injection in login rejected (401)
Security - Protected endpoints work with valid token
Security - Public endpoints accessible without auth
Slider - NOT auto-rotating (manual control only) - VERIFIED
Admin login - Default password NOT visible on page - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created test messages for security testing (SQL injection and XSS payloads stored safely)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All responsive and security tests passed. Slider autoplay disabled (manual control only). Admin login does not show default password. Routes: /hakkimda (about), /projeler (projects), /iletisim (contact), /admin/login (admin). Security tests created in /app/backend/tests/test_security.py for regression testing.

security_test_summary.sql_injection: All SQL injection attempts handled safely - MongoDB/Pydantic validation prevents injection
security_test_summary.xss: XSS payloads stored as-is but will be escaped by React on display
security_test_summary.auth_bypass: All protected endpoints properly require authentication

responsive_test_summary.mobile_375px: All pages render correctly without horizontal scroll
responsive_test_summary.tablet_768px: Layout adapts properly with full navigation
responsive_test_summary.admin_mobile: Admin panel usable on mobile devices
